summary: Full AuditPage testing across all 6 states (blocked, ready, passed, warning, revision_required, rejected). All 13 acceptance criteria verified and passing. Inspector panel, tab switching, and navigation all working correctly. 44/44 tests passed.
seed_data_creation: None — all mock data via AUDIT_MOCKS in App.js
passed_tests: AuditPage renders at /audit route
Stage heading shows 'Audit'; Audit stage tab is active (border-blue-500 class)
All 4 stage tabs visible: Intake, Compile/Render, Execute, Audit
BLOCKED: state card title = 'Audit is blocked'
BLOCKED: eyebrow text 'Audit blocked' (CSS uppercase = 'AUDIT BLOCKED')
BLOCKED: 'Return to Execute' button present (data-testid=return-to-execute-btn)
BLOCKED: pipeline step result-captured shows 'Blocked' badge
BLOCKED: evidence summary NOT shown (showEvidence = false when blocked)
BLOCKED: decision buttons NOT shown
READY: state card title = 'Ready for audit'
READY: all 4 decision buttons present (Accept, Accept with warning, Request revision, Reject)
READY: evidence summary shown with all 4 rows (Executor result, Validation report, Changed files, Scope)
READY: audit findings: 1 warning listed ('2 test files skipped during validation'), blockers empty
READY: pipeline step validation-reviewed has 'Ready' badge
READY: no Return to Execute button
PASSED: state card title = 'Run accepted'
PASSED: audit-decision pipeline step shows 'Accepted' badge
PASSED: 3 artifacts listed (audit_packet, validation_report, executor_result)
PASSED: inspector Decision section shows 'Accepted'
PASSED: no Return to Execute button
WARNING: state card title = 'Run accepted with warnings'
WARNING: audit-decision step shows 'Accepted w/ warnings' badge
WARNING: 2 warnings listed in findings
WARNING: no Return to Execute button
REVISION_REQUIRED: state card title = 'Revision required'
REVISION_REQUIRED: audit-decision step shows 'Revision required' badge
REVISION_REQUIRED: 1 blocker listed
REVISION_REQUIRED: 'Return to Execute' button present (data-testid=return-to-execute-revision-btn)
REJECTED: state card title = 'Run rejected'
REJECTED: audit-decision step shows 'Rejected' badge
REJECTED: 3 blockers listed
REJECTED: validation status shows 'Failed' in inspector
REJECTED: no Return to Execute button
Inspector Details tab shows all 6 sections: Run State, Audit Readiness, Executor Result, Validation, Scope Review, Decision
Inspector tab switch to Artifacts shows content
Inspector tab switch to Validation shows content
Inspector tab switch to Logs shows content
Inspector tab switch back to Details works
Compile/Render stage tab click navigates to /
Execute stage tab click navigates to /execute
Return to Execute (blocked) button navigates to /execute
Return to Execute (revision_required) button navigates to /execute
No console errors observed across all states
context_for_next_testing_agent: AuditPage fully tested across all 6 states. All 13 acceptance criteria pass. No bugs found. AUDIT_MOCKS in App.js defines all 6 states. App is a React SPA, all data is MOCKED — no real backend. Previous iterations: iteration_1/2 tested CompileRenderPage, iteration_3 tested ExecutePage. All pages pass.
